projects.title: Project Files
projects.spriteLabSnippet:
## SpriteLab
Sprite sheet automation from video.
- Optimized frame processing.
- Export for Godot/Unity.
- Smooth JavaFX interface.
projects.jfxSnippet:
## JFX Business Engine
Modular core for ERP systems.
- Scalable inventory management.
- Secure SQL connectivity.
- Designed for SMBs.
projects.aiSpaceSnippet:
## AI Space
Visual Novel with AI integration.
- Game logic in GDScript.
- Procedural animations.
- Immersive Sci-Fi aesthetics.

terminal.title: Interactive Terminal
terminal.initialMsg1: Connection established. I'm Fede's virtual assistant.
terminal.initialMsg2: You can ask me about: [education], [technologies], [projects] or [contact].
terminal.respEducation: Fede is a Programming student at UTN (National Technological University). He constantly seeks to apply academic theory to real-world systems.
terminal.respTech: His main stack includes React for the frontend, along with solid experience in Java, JavaFX, Python, SQL and Godot Engine for complex logic and games.
terminal.respProjects: Currently developing "Iron & Elfskin" (2D RPG), the "Sprite Lab" tool in Java, and modular ERP systems for SMBs.
terminal.respContact: You can contact him directly through the form at the bottom of this page or on his GitHub profile (@FedeiaTech).
terminal.respCleared: Console cleared. How else can I help you?
terminal.respUnknown: Command not recognized. Try keywords like: education, technologies or projects.

contactForm.title: Contact
contactForm.description: Do you have a project in mind, an idea to collaborate, or just want to say hi? Write to me and I'll get back to you as soon as possible.
contactForm.messagePlaceholder: Tell me about your project or idea...
contactForm.successMsg: I'll get back to you as soon as possible. Thanks for reaching out.
contactForm.errorMsg: Error sending. Check your connection or try again.
contactForm.githubText: You can also find me on
